hooks.command: f="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT")"; case "$f" in *.py) ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0

f="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT")"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$(dirname "$f")" && (cd /Users/alhinai/Desktop/understudy/apps/web && npx --no-install tsc --noEmit) >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
